name: AssertPilot Deterministic Repair Policy
description: Policy decisions are made deterministically from diagnosis evidence first; an LLM policy may refine but should not bypass these safety constraints.

policy_decisions.reason: registered output checked against same-cycle input

ordered_rules.reason: failure occurs near reset; reset assertion or disable iff handling is suspicious
ordered_rules.suggested_fix: check whether reset properties incorrectly use disable iff (rst), and ensure non-reset properties are disabled during reset

ordered_rules.reason: registered output checked against same-cycle input
ordered_rules.suggested_fix: use $past(input) or $past(condition) to align with registered output timing

ordered_rules.reason: testbench appears to check behavior before reset has been released
ordered_rules.suggested_fix: delay stimulus/checks until after reset deassertion and at least one clock tick

ordered_rules.reason: correct RTL failure is not classifiable from logs alone
ordered_rules.suggested_fix: mark spec_or_rtl_ambiguity and do not automatically weaken the assertion

ordered_rules.reason: related trigger scenario is not observed
ordered_rules.suggested_fix: add or revise the testplan item and tb.cpp stimulus for the trigger scenario

ordered_rules.reason: related assertion trigger is not activated
ordered_rules.suggested_fix: add state-bound stimulus that reaches the trigger scenario before strengthening SVA

ordered_rules.reason: trigger is observed and assertion is active, but mutation is not killed
ordered_rules.suggested_fix: strengthen assertion according to mutation type

underflow.suggested_fix: assert empty read does not decrement count and empty remains asserted

overflow.suggested_fix: assert full write does not increment count beyond depth and full remains asserted

stuck_flag.suggested_fix: assert flag value matches the underlying count/state definition

grant_without_request.suggested_fix: assert any grant implies a corresponding prior request

data_changes_under_stall.suggested_fix: assert output data remains stable while valid is held and downstream is stalled

ordered_rules.reason: trigger scenario is not present in coverage_scenarios.json
ordered_rules.suggested_fix: add trigger scenario to coverage_scenarios/testplan before generating assertions

ordered_rules.reason: trigger scenario is defined but not observed
ordered_rules.suggested_fix: add state-bound stimulus for the trigger scenario

ordered_rules.reason: trigger is observed but assertion is not activated
ordered_rules.suggested_fix: inspect assertion antecedent width or signal timing alignment

safety_constraints: Never weaken an assertion just to make buggy RTL pass.
If correct RTL and spec appear inconsistent, mark spec_or_rtl_ambiguity.
If the diagnosis is ambiguous, prefer inspect_spec_or_rtl over automatic repair.
